title: Orso Meeto
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:OrsoMeeto.png]] |name=Orso Meeto |homeworld= |birth= |death=c. [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Orvax IV]][[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] |species=[[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] |skin=Blue |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|This morning… you sold a youngling—''"
"''I sell lots of younglings…|Dass Jennir questions Orso Meeto about Resa Greenbark|}} '''Orso Meeto''' was a [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] [[Slavery/Legends|enslaver]] who worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Orvax IV]], where he lived in the upper levels. During his career, Meeto became one of the most prominent sellers on Orvax and sold many enslaved [[Youngling/Legends|children]], including [[Resa Greenbark]], to [[Dezono Qua]], a regular customer from the planet [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. Around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dass Jennir]] tracked Meeto down whilst searching for Greenbark, and, after learning from him that she had been sold to Qua and taken to Esseles, he [[Death/Legends|killed]] the enslaver. ==Biography== {{Quote|Who are you? What do you want? My guards are just outside the door—|Orso Meeto, to Dass Jennir|}} During the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] Orso Meeto operated as one of the most prominent [[Slavery/Legends|enslavers]] on [[Orvax IV]], a world known for its enslavement practices.{{CSWECite|II|302|Meeso, Orto}} He regularly sold enslaved individuals to [[Dezono Qua]], a wealthy [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the planet [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], who bought a [[Youngling/Legends|child]] from the Chagrian around every ten cycles. Around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], about a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[Declaration of a New Order|inauguration]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Meeto came into possession of a group of enslaved [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]]s, which the Empire had captured on the group's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] whilst the Nosaurians were trying to escape from a [[Cleansing of New Plympto|conflict]] with Imperial forces. Shortly after Meeto had taken ownership of the Nosaurians, Qua visited him one morning and purchased one of them, a young [[Gender/Legends|female]] named [[Resa Greenbark]]. When the child was taken from the group, her [[Parent/Legends|mother]], [[Mesa Greenbark]], fought so hard to prevent the loss of her child that Meeto and his men were forced to [[Death/Legends|kill]] her. [[File:MeetoDead-DarkTimes4.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Dass Jennir killed Orso Meeto.]] After Qua left with his purchase, Meeto returned to his [[Meeto's residence|private residence]] and, with two guards stationed outside his room, began drinking and viewing a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of a Chagrian dancing. As he observed the hologram, a Human burst through the balcony [[Window/Legends|window]] of his room with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] aimed at the Chagrian. Shocked, Meeto demanded to know who the individual was and what he wanted, warning him that he had guards stationed outside. The individual, who was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] named [[Dass Jennir]], questioned Meeto about the location of Resa Greenbark, at one point hitting him hard enough with the blaster to draw [[Blood/Legends|blood]]. Jennir promised Meeto that if he gave up the name of his client, Jennir would become the client's problem instead of Meeto's. The Chagrian told Jennir where to find Qua but was horrified when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] did not lower his weapon. To prevent Meeto from informing Qua that he was in danger, Jennir shot the enslaver through the head, killing him instantly, which brought Meeto's guards running into the room. However, Jennir escaped by leaping from the balcony window. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|No… Don't do it…|Orso Meeto's last words|}} Meeto was a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] Chagrian who saw the bartering of other [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings as acceptable business. When Resa Greenbark's mother, whom Meeto had enslaved, fought to prevent her child from being taken, Meeto had his guards kill her, considering her stupid for causing her own demise. Meeto swiftly gave up information on where to find Dezono Qua, one of his regular clients, in order to save his own life and begged for Jennir not to shoot him when the Jedi chose to kill Meeto anyway. ==Equipment== Whilst alone in his private residence, Meeto, on at least one occasion, wore a purple [[Robe/Legends|robe]] with a blue [[Clothing/Legends|garment]] underneath along with blue leggings and a pair of slippers. ==Behind the scenes== Orso Meeto first appeared in the [[Dark Times 4|fourth issue]] of [[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere|''The Path to Nowhere'']] story arc of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]''. The issue was written by [[Randy Stradley]] under the pen name{{InsiderCite|127|Blaster}} Mike Harrison, illustrated by [[Douglas Wheatley]], and published on [[July 18]], [[2007]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54078/star_wars_dark_times_2006_4|text=Star Wars: Dark Times (2006) #4}} ==Appearances== *[[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Times 5|''Dark Times'' 5]] {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Orso Meeto |hu=Orso Meeto |pl=Orso Meeto }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Meeto, Orso}} [[Category:Chagrians]] [[Category:Enslavers]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
